_readme: Domain-bound playhtml permission rules for playhtml.fun.
Whoever controls this file controls the rules — the playhtml server
fetches it (cached ~5 min) and enforces these rules for every room on
To claim an admin/shopkeeper key: open any playhtml.fun page, run
`playhtml.me.pid` in the console, and replace the placeholder below.
Invalid placeholder keys are safely ignored (the role just has no
members), so admin-gated elements deny everyone until a real key is set.
In local dev this file is served by the Vite dev server; run
`bun dev-server` so the local partykit server can fetch and enforce it.
